ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "prop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the property was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current estimated value of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, rented, under renovation) */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant if the property is rented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvements" (
  "imprv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement */,
  "prop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the improvement is associated with */,
  "imprv_type_cd" TEXT /* Code representing the type of improvement */,
  "imprv_type_desc" TEXT /* Description of the improvement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the improvement project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the improvement project */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the improvement */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor who performed the improvement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the improvement project */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used in the improvement */,
  "labor_hours" REAL /* Total labor hours spent on the improvement */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the improvement approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imprv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvements_imprv_type_cd FOREIGN KEY ("imprv_type_cd") REFERENCES improvement_types ("imprv_type_cd"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvements_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvements_prop_id FOREIGN KEY ("prop_id") REFERENCES properties ("prop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_types" (
  "imprv_type_cd" TEXT /* Code representing the type of improvement */,
  "imprv_type_desc" TEXT /* Description of the improvement type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the improvement type (e.g., structural, cosmetic, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imprv_type_cd")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, project manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_prop_id FOREIGN KEY ("prop_id") REFERENCES properties ("prop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "imprv_id" INTEGER /* ID of the improvement record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the improvement record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the improvement record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvement_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvement_access_imprv_id FOREIGN KEY ("imprv_id") REFERENCES improvements ("imprv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value change entry */,
  "prop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the value change is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the value change */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the property at that time */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the value change (e.g., market fluctuation, improvement, reassessment) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who updated the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_prop_id FOREIGN KEY ("prop_id") REFERENCES properties ("prop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
